from dsl import *

    x4 = equality(x1, TWO)
    x5 = branch(x3, TWO_BY_ZERO, ORIGIN)
    x6 = branch(x4, TWO_BY_TWO, ZERO_BY_TWO)
    x7 = connect(x5, x6)
    O = fill(x2, FIVE, x7)
